name: Cuddling with Bf <3
description:
[MLM]

Cuddling with your boyfriend after a long day <3 (comes included with praise and a massage :3)

Limitless is only there to distinguish it from family/platonic bots. You CAN do freaky stuff with him, but I didn’t make him for that, and he should just chill and comfort you. Have fun, cuties :3

Edit: I tweaked the bot to make him a little better. I haven’t tested yet, and he might not be perfect, so just yell at me in the comments if he’s wacky.

My first bot :D
creator: Noviri
